intro: A frightened peasant blocks the path.
An undead soldier raises a rusted blade.
A starving ghoul watches every movement.
An ashen pilgrim whispers an old prayer.
A crypt hound growls from the shadows.
A cursed archer aims with trembling hands.
A grave warden refuses to abandon the gate.
A mourning scribe protects a book of names.
A lantern acolyte shields a fading flame.
A rust rat circles the battlefield with nervous steps.
The black knight waits in complete silence.
An abyss watcher tests your resolve.
A silver captain studies your stance.
A cathedral sentinel guards the ruined nave.
A profaned jailer drags heavy chains behind him.
A crystal adept bends the light around you.
An iron inquisitor asks for a confession.
A moonlit duelist salutes before attacking.
A bell tower keeper listens for a final chime.
A legendary dragonslayer lowers his spear.
A wounded knight fights against the abyss.
The lord of cinder rises from the ash.
An ancient dragon opens one golden eye.
The abyssal monarch smiles without warmth.
The dancer moves before the music begins.
A nameless warden bars the final passage.
A saint of ashes waits with open hands.
The eclipse devourer bends the room into darkness.
The first flame guardian stands before the last door.
